title: helichrysum polycladum
intro: Helichrysum polycladum, also known as mountain helichrysum or cape aloe, is a perennial shrub native to the mountainous regions of South Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum polycladum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum polycladum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
